incoming_email: Hey, my Slack is acting up and I can't see any of the huddle controls. Anyone else having this? I already tried restarting.

incoming_email: urgent! lost my yubikey somewhere in the parking lot. need a replacement asap to log into AWS. please help.
reference_reply: Oh no! I can disable the lost key immediately. Please go to the IT Self-Service Portal to request a new one, or reply with the Jira ticket number if you've already created one.

reference_reply: VPN is up, but there might be an IP whitelist issue. Please raise a ticket on the IT Self-Service Portal so the network team can look at it, or send over the Jira ticket number.
